title: Sentinel of the Grove
caption: A centuries-old oak standing guard over moss-covered stones.
story: The gnarly bark of this ancient oak tells stories of centuries of storms and quiet sunrises. Moss clings to its massive trunk like a velvet coat.
curatorNote: Key centerpiece image for Volume 1. Exquisite texture detail on the bark.
altText: A massive old oak tree covered in green moss with twisting branches in a quiet forest setting.
